name: @tx-code/occt-js
description: OCCT CAD import via WebAssembly — read STEP/IGES/BREP files in the browser

scripts.test: node --test test/load_occt_factory.test.mjs test/wasm_build_prereqs.test.mjs && node test/test_multi_format_exports.mjs && node test/test_iges_degenerated_edges.mjs && node test/test_step_iges_root_mode.mjs && node test/test_brep_root_mode.mjs && node test/test_optimal_orientation_api.mjs && node test/test_optimal_orientation_reference.mjs && node test/test_mvp_acceptance.mjs
